title: Skeptikos
description:
Skeptikos is the first solo game from DustWyrm Studio.

Solve the puzzles that stand before you, master the mechanics that get in your way. Accept that sometimes you must shut down in order to move forward.

• Turn off your power to respawn further away.

• Cut gravity to stop falling.

• Use the protogun to reach new targets.

Take control of an android in a mysterious training facility. Learn to control your environment while your supervisors awkwardly try to guide you.

Progress through your training, uncover the secrets of this place, collect... Mugs?
And above all, who is Dan?
description_short: Skeptikos is a solo game taking place in a strange formation center. Resolve the puzzles, find the secrets around here.
